title: Fecal DNA Extraction by Bead Beating
author: Chin Yee Tan
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.zvrf656

steps.title: For each 2ml screw cap tube,...
steps.instruction: For each 2ml screw cap tube, Add 400 µL, beads Add 550 µL, Phenol/chloroform Add 250 µL, SDS Add 500 µL, PB buffer .

steps.title: Spin down the tubes for 00:05:00...
steps.instruction: Spin down the tubes for 00:05:00 at 4000 RPM in microcentrifuge.

steps.title: Proceed to PCR purification kit –...
steps.instruction: Proceed to PCR purification kit – for the purification of up to 10 ug PCR products.

steps.title: Label & Place a QIAquick column...
steps.instruction: Label & Place a QIAquick column in a 2ml collection tube (provided).

steps.title: Apply the aqueous top layer of...
steps.instruction: Apply the aqueous top layer of your sample onto the column and centrifuge for 00:01:00 , 17,900g (13,000 RPM), at room temperature.

steps.title: After the spin, dump the contents of the collection tube
steps.instruction: After the spin, dump the contents of the collection tube.

steps.title: Wash the column by adding 750...
steps.instruction: Wash the column by adding 750 µL of Buffer PE and repeat the spin at the same conditions for 00:01:00 .

steps.title: After the second wash and spin,...
steps.instruction: After the second wash and spin, and after dumping the contents of the collection tube, Spin the column and collection tube one last time to remove residual wash buffer for 00:01:30 .

steps.title: Place each QIAquick column in a clean 1
steps.instruction: Place each QIAquick column in a clean 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: To elute DNA, add 50 µL...
steps.instruction: To elute DNA, add 50 µL Buffer EB (provided in kit) OR water (pH of 7.0-8.5) to the center of the Qiaquick membrane and allow the tube to sit for 00:02:00 .

steps.title: Centrifuge the column for 00:01:30 17,900g...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the column for 00:01:30 17,900g (13,000 RPM), at room temperature.

steps.title: Quantify with the Qubit dsDNA BR Assay kit
steps.instruction: Quantify with the Qubit dsDNA BR Assay kit. Alternatively, a nanodrop suffices.
